title_en: Why Sir Christopher Nolan inspires such devotion—and contempt
title_zh: 为何克里斯托弗·诺兰会赢得如此狂热的追捧与蔑视
rubric_en: His films are ambitious and technically brilliant, but often emotionally detached
rubric_zh: 他的电影雄心勃勃、技术上出色，却常常情感上显得疏离

paragraphs.en: THE SEVEN most dangerous words anyone can say to a film aficionado are: “What do you think of Christopher Nolan?” The question will almost certainly elicit one of two reactions: a long, fevered disquisition on the masterful craftsmanship of his 12 feature films (now 13, with the release of “The Odyssey”)—or eye-rolling contempt. Almost nobody will shrug and say, “Eh, he’s fine.”
paragraphs.zh: 对电影发烧友来说，最危险的七个词之一就是：“你怎么看克里斯托弗·诺兰？”这个问题几乎必然引发两种反应之一：要么是对他这位导演12部长片（现在有了《奥德赛》后是13部）炉火纯青工艺的漫长、热烈论辩，要么就是翻个白眼的轻蔑。几乎没人会不经思索地耸肩说一句：“嗯，还行。”

paragraphs.en: Perhaps that is unsurprising: ambitious artists tend to provoke strong reactions, and Sir Christopher Nolan is nothing if not ambitious. He is the seventh-highest-grossing film director ever, and the most important British film-maker since Alfred Hitchcock. Like Hitchcock, he is devoted to the technical work of film-making: “The Odyssey” is the first blockbuster to be shot entirely on IMAX film, a format that produces sumptuous images but is harder to work with than digital cinematography.
paragraphs.zh: 这也许并不令人惊讶：有抱负的艺术家本就容易激起强烈反应，而克里斯托弗·诺兰绝对不是没有抱负的。按票房总额计算，他是有史以来第七位最高票房导演，也是阿尔弗雷德·希区柯克之后最重要的英国电影人。和希区柯克一样，他痴迷于电影制作的技术层面： 《奥德赛》是第一部全片都用 IMAX 胶片拍摄的商业大片，这种格式能带来华丽的画面，但比数字电影摄影更难驾驭。

paragraphs.en: Sir Christopher stands out from his peers for having the widest-ranging, most original and brainiest oeuvre. Like many directors working today, he has done franchise flicks—he made three Batman films between 2005 and 2012—but they were an interlude rather than the capstone of his career. So what is it about Sir Christopher that makes him such a divisive film-maker?
paragraphs.zh: 诺兰在同行中之所以格外突出，是因为他的作品覆盖面最广、最有原创性、也最“有脑”。和许多当代导演一样，他也拍过系列电影——2005年至2012年间他拍了三部《蝙蝠侠》——但那只是职业生涯中的一次插曲，而不是压轴之作。那究竟是什么，让诺兰成为一位如此两极分化的电影作者？

paragraphs.en: Start with the man himself. He was born in 1970 to a British father and an American mother. He works with family: his wife, Emma Thomas, produces his films; his uncle, John Nolan, acted in some of them; he writes with his brother Jonathan; and his four children worked on “The Odyssey”. He is efficient, known for shooting films quickly and often to budget.
paragraphs.zh: 先从他本人说起。他于1970年出生，父亲是英国人，母亲是美国人。他的创作离不开家庭：妻子艾玛·托马斯负责制作他的电影；叔叔约翰·诺兰参演了其中几部；他与哥哥乔纳森共同执笔；他的四个孩子也参与了《奥德赛》的制作。他工作高效，以拍片节奏快且常常控制住预算而闻名。

paragraphs.en: Tom Shone, a film critic who wrote a book about Sir Christopher, has described him as “a very familiar type of Englishman…the kind of upper-middle-class son of the home counties one could imagine with a career in the City who plays rugby with his fellow brokers on the weekend”. That implies a streak of conservatism, which emerges in his work. His final Batman film, “The Dark Knight Rises” (2012), warns against the tempting, corrosive zeal of revolutionary violence. Paternal duty powers “Interstellar” (2014). “Dunkirk” (2017) celebrates British doughtiness.
paragraphs.zh: 电影评论家汤姆·肖恩在一本关于克里斯托弗·诺兰的著作中把他描述为“一个非常熟悉的英格兰人类型……那种你可以想象得到的英格兰中上层家庭出身的‘本都县’子弟，在城市里有一份职业，周末与同事经纪人一起打橄榄球的人”。这暗示出一种保守主义倾向，而这种倾向在他的作品中也有所体现。他的最终一部《蝙蝠侠》电影《黑暗骑士崛起》（2012）警示人们革命性暴力所带来的诱惑与侵蚀性的狂热。《星际穿越》（2014）则以“父职责任”作为动力源。《敦刻尔克》（2017）歌颂了英国人的坚韧不拔。

paragraphs.en: However, his films are defined less by conservatism than by their slipperiness. His breakout film, “Memento” (2000), about an amnesiac trying to solve his wife’s murder, would be chewed over by fans and detractors for years afterwards. Many viewers praised its structural inventiveness: black-and-white scenes tell a story chronologically and colour ones tell one in reverse. They meet at the end.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，与其说他的电影由保守主义定义，不如说更容易让人觉得它们滑溜难以把握。他的突破之作《记忆碎片》（2000）讲述一位失忆男子试图侦破妻子谋杀案，这部片子多年后仍被影迷与反对者反复讨论。许多观众称赞其结构上的巧思：黑白场景按时间顺序推进，而彩色场景则倒着讲述；两者在结尾处交会。

paragraphs.en: More tricksiness would follow. “Inception” (2010) imagined the manipulation of dreams for corporate espionage. “Interstellar” takes place on multiple planets and features a wormhole and a black hole. Three narratives come together in “Dunkirk”. In “Tenet” (2020) people and objects move forwards and backwards through time. Even “Oppenheimer” (2023), a biopic of an American theoretical physicist, jumps between the 1930s, 1940s and 1950s.
paragraphs.zh: 更多更诡谲的手法接踵而至。《盗梦空间》（2010）构想了通过梦境操控来实施企业间间谍活动。《星际穿越》发生在多个行星之间，并出现了虫洞与黑洞。《敦刻尔克》里有三条叙事线交汇。《信条》（2020）中，人和物体都会在时间中前行和后退。即便是《奥本海默》（2023）这样一部关于美国理论物理学家的传记片，也在20世纪30年代、40年代和50年代之间跳转。

paragraphs.en: Sir Christopher’s films often provide a satisfying moment of realisation. But they rarely reward viewers who ruminate on the plot after the credits roll. In the case of “Memento”, for instance, you might wonder how a character with amnesia remembers his amnesia. Roger Ebert, a late American film critic, joked that the protagonist “suffers from a condition brought on by a screenplay that finds it necessary, and it’s unkind of us to inquire too deeply”.
paragraphs.zh: 诺兰的电影常常能带来一个令人满足的“恍然大悟”时刻。但它们很少会奖励那些在片尾字幕后仍反复思索情节的观众。以《记忆碎片》为例，你可能会想：一个失忆者究竟如何记得自己患有失忆症？已故美国影评人罗杰·艾伯特开玩笑说，男主角“遭受了一种由电影剧本引发的状态，而这种状态本身就有其合理性；我们若深追其因，未免有失礼貌。”

paragraphs.en: Similar questions could be asked of dreams, wormholes or, in “The Prestige” (2006), his film about magicians, cloning and teleportation. All of it makes for entertaining cinema, but it does not make much sense. Viewers’ enjoyment of these films hinges on their willingness to suspend scepticism and tune into the vibe.
paragraphs.zh: 同样的问题也可以拿来问他的梦境、虫洞，或《致命魔术》（2006）——这部关于魔术师、克隆与传送的电影。所有这些素材都能拍出有趣的电影，但并不十分讲得通。观众对这些影片的欣赏，取决于他们是否愿意暂时搁置怀疑，转而投入它的氛围。

paragraphs.en: A more serious charge concerns Sir Christopher’s treatment of female characters. The most important woman in “Memento” is the protagonist’s dead wife. Dead wives or girlfriends also further the plots of “The Prestige”, “Inception”, “The Dark Knight” and “Interstellar”. “Dunkirk” features just two minor female characters.
paragraphs.zh: 一个更严肃的指控涉及诺兰对女性角色的处理。《记忆碎片》里最重要的女性角色是主人公的已故妻子。《致命魔术》《盗梦空间》《黑暗骑士》和《星际穿越》中，已故的妻子或女友也都推动着情节发展。《敦刻尔克》里只出现了两个次要女性角色。

paragraphs.en: This charge can be overblown, though. “Interstellar” features two strong female figures. Anne Hathaway, Katie Holmes and Maggie Gyllenhaal play integral roles in the Batman films. And Emily Blunt got an Oscar nod for her stellar performance as J. Robert Oppenheimer’s (admittedly stoic and long-suffering) wife. Sir Christopher has not written a female protagonist just as Greta Gerwig, a star female director, has not written a male one in her solo projects.
paragraphs.zh: 不过，这一指控可能有些夸大。《星际穿越》中有两个性格鲜明的女性角色。安妮·海瑟薇、凯蒂·霍尔姆斯和玛吉·吉伦哈尔在《蝙蝠侠》系列电影中都扮演了重要角色。艾米莉·布朗特因其出色演绎J·罗伯特·奥本海默的妻子而获奥斯卡提名，这位妻子虽确实坚忍且长期承受痛苦。诺兰并没有写过女性主角，正如明星女性导演格蕾塔·格威格在她的个人作品中也没有写过男性主角。

paragraphs.en: For it is not women, but people, in whom Sir Christopher has only recently begun to show interest. The protagonist in “Tenet”, as well as a pivotal character in “Dunkirk”, has no name. Many film-makers progress from small, intimate films to bigger-budget, higher-concept ones; in some ways, Sir Christopher has taken the opposite path, going from films that unfold like puzzles to something more human.
paragraphs.zh: 因为真正的问题并非在于女性，而是人物；诺兰直到最近才开始真正关注“人”。《信条》里的主角，以及《敦刻尔克》里一个关键人物，都是没有名字的。许多电影人是从小制作、私密题材的电影走向预算更高、理念更宏大的作品；在某种程度上，诺兰走的是相反路线，从像谜题一样展开的电影走向更偏向人性的一面。

paragraphs.en: “Oppenheimer” depicted the enmity between the titular character and Lewis Strauss, his bureaucratic nemesis. As such, it was Sir Christopher’s first film to feature a conflict of actual personalities, as opposed to goals, as in “Interstellar”, “Inception” and “The Prestige”, or good versus evil, as in “Tenet” and his superhero films. In making “The Odyssey”—the story of a man returning to his family—Sir Christopher has, like the gods of Homer, started paying attention to mere mortals. ■
paragraphs.zh: 《奥本海默》描绘了片名人物与其官僚宿敌路易斯·斯特劳斯之间的敌对关系。因此，这成为诺兰首部以真实人物之间的冲突为核心的电影，不同于《星际穿越》《盗梦空间》和《致命魔术》中围绕目标的冲突，或《信条》与他那几部超级英雄电影中的“善与恶”对立。在拍摄《奥德赛》——一个男人重返家人的故事——时，诺兰像荷马笔下的诸神一样，开始关注普通人。

paragraphs.zh: 如果想了解更多最新的书籍、电影、电视剧、专辑和争议，请订阅 Plot Twist，我们每周为订阅者推出的通讯。
